$comment: Passive profiling uses the native hook_record_fast.exe on Windows; non-Windows hooks are a no-op. Pre+PostToolUse record start/result so `status` derives each command's duration_ms (the native hot path keeps overhead ~1-2ms/call); successful read-only plumbing/search commands are skipped. Records append per-session to tmp/session_profiles/sessions/ for `node ai_studio/core_harness/profiling/status.mjs`. Mirror config for Codex: .codex/hooks.json.
